allow: Bash(rdm config:*)
Bash(rdm list:*)
Bash(git init:*)
Bash(rdm agent-config:*)
WebSearch
Bash(rdm roadmap:*)
Bash(rdm phase:*)
Bash(rdm task:*)

Bash(rdm --stage phase create foundation --roadmap v1 --title "Foundation" --no-edit --body "Monorepo scaffolding, TypeScript config, Docker Compose setup \(frontend, backend, postgres\), Prisma ORM, base Express API, and CI-ready project structure.")

Bash(rdm --stage phase create auth --roadmap v1 --title "Authentication" --no-edit --body "Google OAuth2 \(primary\) and local username/password \(secondary\) auth via Passport.js. JWT-based sessions, user roles \(admin, member\), and role middleware.")

Bash(rdm --stage phase create swap-management --roadmap v1 --title "Swap Management" --no-edit --body "Admin ability to create, open, and close swaps with start/end dates. Swap lifecycle: upcoming, active, closed. Closed swaps are read-only.")

Bash(rdm --stage phase create listings --roadmap v1 --title "Seedling Listings" --no-edit --body "CRUD for seedling listings scoped to an active swap. Fields: plant name, variety, quantity, notes, optional photo. Photo stored on local filesystem via mounted Docker volume. Plant lookup/autocomplete via Perenual API with local PostgreSQL cache.")

Bash(rdm --stage phase create claiming --roadmap v1 --title "Claiming System" --no-edit --body "Users can claim one or more units from a listing. Claims are recorded automatically. Available quantity decrements on claim. Listings become unavailable when fully claimed.")

Bash(rdm --stage task create monorepo-scaffold --title "Scaffold monorepo \(frontend + backend\)" --no-edit --body "Set up a pnpm workspace monorepo with packages/frontend \(Vite + React + TypeScript\) and packages/backend \(Node + TypeScript + Express\). Shared tsconfig base." --tags "phase-1-foundation,v1")

Bash(rdm --stage task create docker-compose --title "Docker Compose setup" --no-edit --body "docker-compose.yml with three services: postgres \(official image\), backend \(Node app\), frontend \(nginx serving built React app\). Mount volume for photo storage. Environment variable configuration via .env." --tags "phase-1-foundation,v1")

Bash(rdm --stage task create prisma-schema --title "Prisma schema and initial migration" --no-edit --body "Define Prisma schema for: User, Swap, Listing, Claim, PlantCache. Run initial migration. Seed script for development." --tags "phase-1-foundation,v1")

Bash(rdm --stage task create base-api --title "Base Express API with middleware" --no-edit --body "Express app with TypeScript, error handling middleware, request logging, CORS config, health check endpoint, and static file serving for photos." --tags "phase-1-foundation,v1")

Bash(rdm --stage task create google-oauth --title "Google OAuth2 integration" --no-edit --body "Passport.js Google OAuth2 strategy. Store Google profile ID, email, display name on User. Handle first-time login \(auto-create user\) vs returning user. JWT issued on success." --tags "phase-2-auth,v1")

Bash(rdm --stage task create local-auth --title "Local username/password auth" --no-edit --body "Passport.js local strategy. Registration endpoint \(email + password, bcrypt hashing\). Login endpoint. Consistent error messaging to avoid user enumeration." --tags "phase-2-auth,v1")

Bash(rdm --stage task create jwt-sessions --title "JWT session middleware and role guards" --no-edit --body "Issue signed JWTs on login. Auth middleware to verify token on protected routes. Role-based guard middleware for admin-only routes." --tags "phase-2-auth,v1")

Bash(rdm --stage task create auth-ui --title "Auth UI \(login, register, OAuth button\)" --no-edit --body "Login page with Google OAuth button \(primary\) and email/password form \(secondary\). Registration form for local accounts. Redirect handling post-login. Protected route wrapper in React." --tags "phase-2-auth,v1")

Bash(rdm --stage task create swap-api --title "Swap CRUD API" --no-edit --body "Endpoints: POST /swaps \(admin\), PATCH /swaps/:id/open \(admin\), PATCH /swaps/:id/close \(admin\), GET /swaps \(list\), GET /swaps/active, GET /swaps/:id. Enforce only one active swap at a time." --tags "phase-3-swap-management,v1")

Bash(rdm --stage task create swap-ui --title "Swap management UI \(admin\)" --no-edit --body "Admin page to create a new swap \(name, event date, open/close dates\). Buttons to open and close a swap. Display current swap status. List of past swaps linking to history." --tags "phase-3-swap-management,v1")

Bash(rdm --stage task create swap-context --title "Active swap context in frontend" --no-edit --body "React context/hook that exposes the current active swap \(if any\). Used site-wide to gate listing creation, claiming, etc. Banner shown when no swap is active." --tags "phase-3-swap-management,v1")

Bash(rdm --stage task create listing-api --title "Listing CRUD API" --no-edit --body "Endpoints: POST /listings, GET /listings \(scoped to active swap\), GET /listings/:id, PATCH /listings/:id \(owner or admin\), DELETE /listings/:id \(owner or admin\). Enforce active swap requirement for creation." --tags "phase-4-listings,v1")

Bash(rdm --stage task create photo-upload --title "Photo upload API and storage" --no-edit --body "Multer middleware for multipart photo upload. Store file on local filesystem \(Docker volume\). Serve via static route. Validate file type \(image\) and size limit. Associate photo URL with listing." --tags "phase-4-listings,v1")

Bash(rdm --stage task create plant-api-integration --title "Perenual plant API integration with cache" --no-edit --body "Backend service to query Perenual API for plant name autocomplete and detail lookup. Cache results in PlantCache table \(keyed by Perenual ID\) with TTL. Expose GET /plants/search?q= endpoint for frontend typeahead." --tags "phase-4-listings,v1")

Bash(rdm --stage task create listing-ui --title "Listing create/edit UI" --no-edit --body "Form to create a listing: plant name \(typeahead against plant search API\), variety, quantity, notes, optional photo upload. Edit form for owner/admin. Display plant info panel when a plant is selected." --tags "phase-4-listings,v1")

Bash(rdm --stage task create listings-browse-ui --title "Listings browse/feed UI" --no-edit --body "Main page showing all listings for the active swap. Cards with plant name, variety, quantity available vs claimed, poster name, photo thumbnail. Filter/search by plant name. Link to listing detail." --tags "phase-4-listings,v1")

Bash(rdm --stage task create claim-api --title "Claim API" --no-edit --body "POST /listings/:id/claims with quantity. Validate: swap active, listing has enough remaining quantity, user hasn't already claimed this listing \(or allow and sum\). Decrement available count atomically. GET /listings/:id/claims \(admin\). GET /users/me/claims." --tags "phase-5-claiming,v1")

Bash(rdm --stage task create claim-ui --title "Claim UI" --no-edit --body "Claim button + quantity selector on listing detail page. Show remaining quantity. Confirmation on success. User's 'My Claims' page listing everything they've claimed across the active swap." --tags "phase-5-claiming,v1")

Bash(rdm --stage task create label-generation --title "PDF label generation service" --no-edit --body "Backend service using @react-pdf/renderer \(or pdf-lib\) to generate label PDFs. One label per claimed unit — if a user claimed 2, generate 2 labels: '1 of 2' and '2 of 2'. Each label: plant name, variety, claimer name, poster name, ordinal. Group labels into a single downloadable PDF per request." --tags "phase-6-labels,v1")

Bash(rdm --stage task create label-api --title "Label download API endpoints" --no-edit --body "GET /claims/labels/mine — PDF of all labels for the current user's claims in the active swap. GET /swaps/:id/labels \(admin\) — PDF of all labels for all claims in a swap." --tags "phase-6-labels,v1")

Bash(rdm --stage task create label-ui --title "Label download UI" --no-edit --body "Download button on 'My Claims' page for user's own labels. Admin panel button to download all labels for a swap. Show label count before download." --tags "phase-6-labels,v1")

Bash(rdm --stage task create user-management --title "User management \(admin\)" --no-edit --body "Admin API: GET /admin/users, PATCH /admin/users/:id/role \(grant/revoke admin\). Admin UI: table of all users, toggle admin role. Prevent self-demotion." --tags "phase-7-admin-panel,v1")

Bash(rdm --stage task create admin-overview --title "Admin overview dashboard" --no-edit --body "Admin dashboard showing: active swap summary \(listing count, claim count, unclaimed quantity\), quick links to swap management, user management, and full label export." --tags "phase-7-admin-panel,v1")

Bash(rdm --stage task create history-api --title "Swap history API" --no-edit --body "GET /swaps \(all, including closed\) with summary stats. GET /swaps/:id with full listings and claims. Only closed swaps accessible in history view; active swap accessible via main app flow." --tags "phase-8-history,v1")

Bash(rdm --stage task create history-ui --title "Swap history UI" --no-edit --body "History page listing all past swaps with event date, listing count, claim count. Click into a swap to see all listings, their claims, and claimed quantities. Read-only. Stats summary per swap." --tags "phase-8-history,v1")
Bash(rdm promote:*)
Bash(rdm describe:*)
Bash(rdm commit:*)
Bash(rdm tree:*)
Bash(docker compose:*)
